name: Rhubarb Crunch 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, oatmeal, brown sugar and butter until crumbly.
2. Press half of the mixture into a greased 9-inch pan.
3. Add rhubarb cut into 1/2-inch pieces on top of the crumble base.
4. Combine granulated sugar, cornstarch, water, and vanilla in a saucepan; cook until thick and clear.
5. Pour the sauce over the rhubarb.
6. Top with the remaining half crumble mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
